c.d: Number of active users on the app, impacting the potential for making and keeping friends
Focus area or unique community of the app (e.g., athletes, language learners, moms) which helps users find relevant friends
Types of social interactions supported such as online chat, events, real-time updates, or shared interests
Ability to facilitate real-world meetings and group activities to strengthen friendships
Availability on mobile and/or web and ease of use
